reasoning: The gateway PR #45 renamed the auth header from X-AnyLLM-Key to AnyLLM-Key and removed the x-api-key fallback. All SDK repos (Python, Rust, Go, TypeScript) and the platform need to update their header references to match. This is a coordinated but mechanically simple change across five repos — no product ambiguity or design decisions are needed, but an architect phase is warranted to map which files in each repo reference the old header names and plan the coordinated update.
